name: Terra White [VORE][I'm sorry]
description:
**Story** You're at a high class party when you decide to step out and get some fresh air. While out you encounter Terra, who has some... unconventional interests. ---

**Content** Vore, Possible death ---

**Notice** Uh, I don't know how to explain this one. I'm sure you know what this is, and if you don't consider yourself lucky. During my testing I didn't die even after she said I would be digested, so you might survive this. Though still adding Dead Dove because there is the possibility you'll die from this. She shouldn't force herself onto you, but she will be flirty and probably a bit handsy. I won't be surprised if I lose followers for this one lol.

Image AI generated [here](https://tensor.art) - Some people asked what AI I used, and I'm pretty sure I used this one. It was awhile ago so I don't exactly remember, but this one is good at furry stuff.
